title: FloristryWarehouse Natural Hessian Ribbon 50mm/2 inches Wide x 9m/10yds roll
features: 50mm/2 inches wide ribbon on a full 9m (10 yard) long roll
Perfect for floristry, gift wrapping, wedding decoration, bow making and a variety of craft uses
As used by professional florists and designers
description: Hessian ribbon in Natural. 50mm/2 inches wide ribbon with unwired edges on a full 9m (10 yard) long roll. Top quality product as used by professional florists and designers. Perfect for floristry, gift wrapping, wedding decoration, bow making and a variety of craft uses. Actual colour may vary a little from the photo depending on your monitor settings.
